title: Properties Galore!
description: Shape properties change how shapes look. Focus: fill, border, rotateAngle, opacity.

flashcards.definition: Fill is the inside color of a shape.
Border (outline) is the line around a shape. Border width controls thickness.

quiz.prompt: Which property controls the inside color of a shape?
quiz.feedbackCorrect: Correct: fill controls the inside color.
quiz.feedbackIncorrect: Fill controls the inside color of a shape.
rotateAngle rotates a shape (usually in degrees).
